center.name: Mount Kitanglad
center.summary: Mount Kitanglad是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联26种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Everett's scops owl、Philippine serpent eagle等26种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas like Pasonanca Natural Park, Mount Apo and Mount Kitanglad on Mindanao, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

Occurs in a few protected areas like Pasonanca Natural Park, Mount Apo and Mount Kitanglad on Mindanao, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection and enforcement of laws surrounding illegal logging and hunting are lacking

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: They are mainly threatened by habitat loss, hunting and trapping for the pet trade. It is found in a few protected areas including Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape, Mount Kanlaon, Pasonanca Natural Park, Mount Apo, Mount Kitanglad, Mount Hamiguitan, Mount Malindang, Samar Island Natural Park and Balinsasayao Twin Lakes Natural Park but actual protection from deforestation is still lax
